calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-05-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Plaintiff ANNE-MARIE BASSO in pro per
PHILIP A. SEGAL for defendant MICHELLE MEZA, who is also present

This case resumes this day subsequent to a recess previously called.

Parties present their respective cases by testimony and documentary evidence under oath.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Evidence is retained.

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-24-2010 Continued To Mar-05-10 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 604
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Plaintiff ANNE-MARIE BASSO in pro per with witness, Cheri Tiai
PHILIP A. SEGAL for defendant MICHELLE MEZA, who is also present

Parties present their respective cases by testimony and documentary evidence under oath.

Due to a medical emergency by plaintiff's witness, the Court continues the matter to
Friday, March 5, 2010 at 8:30 a.m.

Evidence is retained.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2010 Set For Trial On Feb-24-10 At 09:15 A.M. In Dept 604

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-24-2010 Continued To Feb-24-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
